title: Government confirms new vaccination campaign
content: The health ministry announced a nationwide vaccination campaign starting next month with doses distributed through public clinics.

title: City opens new public school campus
content: Local authorities inaugurated a new school campus with science labs library and sports facilities for students.

title: Central bank keeps interest rate unchanged
content: The central bank maintained the benchmark interest rate after reviewing inflation and employment indicators.

title: University publishes climate research report
content: Researchers released a peer reviewed report describing regional climate trends and water management risks.

title: Company launches employee mental health program
content: A corporate wellness initiative now offers therapy support workshops and flexible mental health leave guidelines.

title: Transit authority expands weekend bus schedule
content: The transit agency published revised weekend routes and more frequent departures to reduce wait times.

title: Miracle herb instantly cures every disease
content: An anonymous blog claims a secret herb cures all diseases overnight and hospitals are hiding the truth.

title: Aliens elected as world leaders in secret meeting
content: A fabricated article says alien representatives elected global leaders during a hidden summit on the moon.

title: Banks to erase all debts if message is shared
content: Social media posts falsely claim all personal bank debts will disappear if users forward a chain message.

title: Scientists admit the earth doubles in size yearly
content: A fake story invents unnamed scientists and claims the planet physically doubles in size every year.

title: Celebrity says drinking paint improves memory
content: A sensational article spreads a dangerous false claim that drinking paint improves concentration and memory.

title: Hidden law allows free houses for everyone
content: An unverified website claims a hidden law gives every citizen a free house without any official source.
